Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the rooftop planters with Fuuka...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 13 3 1 6}I bet these taste really good when they're freshly harvested.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 13 3 1 6}Wow, they've gotten so big since we last saw them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 13 3 1 6}The smell of the soil really makes it feel like we're growing something, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it[n]looks like this will be a big harvest.[n]{f 1 1}
